title: Product Card Reference Asset
description: Typed seller collateral for buyer-facing product cards. Each entry carries a semantic role (coverage_map, sample_render, etc.) and a canonical asset payload. Distinct from hero_image/carousel_images (display-oriented) and from core/reference-asset.json (creative-generation oriented).

role.description: Semantic role of this asset. coverage_map: geographic or audience reach visualization; sample_render: mockup of ad placement in context; environment_photo: photo of the physical or digital environment; media_kit: downloadable media kit or spec sheet; logo: seller or property logo; other: seller-defined role (provide role_label).

role_label.description: Human-readable label for the asset role. Required when role is 'other'; optional otherwise.

asset.description: The asset payload, discriminated on asset_type (image, video, markdown, url).

description.description: Optional human-readable context about this asset.
